title: The Warbird is Dead. How the New Salsa Flyway Reimagines the Gravel Race Bike.
content:
The original American gravel bike retires. In its place, the Flyway steps in with progressive geometry, T-shirt sizing, and a focus on a unique vision of racing.

Read the full article at The Warbird is Dead. How the New Salsa Flyway Reimagines the Gravel Race Bike. on Velo.
author: Josh Ross
